Dear Sirs,  
 
Sub: Transcript of the Earnings Call  
 
Further to our letter dated 4th August, 2023 and pursuant to Regulation 30(6) read with Part 
A of Schedule III of SEBI (LODR), Regulations 2015, the transcript of the Earnings call held on 
Monday, August 14, 2023 for the first quarter ended June 30, 2023 has been uploaded on 
the 
Company’s 
website 
at 
https://glenmarkpharma.com/investors/reports-
presentations/earnings-concall/.  
 
Request you to kindly take the same on record.  
 
Thanking you. 
  
Yours faithfully, 
For Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Limited 
 
 
 
Harish Kuber  
Company Secretary & Compliance Officer 
 
Tel: 4018 9999 / 4018 9879 
Fax: 4018 9986 (Legal & Secretarial Dept.)
